hooks.command: if [ "$CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE" = 'true' ]; then [ -z "$GIT_AUTHOR_NAME" ] && echo 'FATAL: GIT_AUTHOR_NAME not set. Configure it in your Claude Code environment at claude.ai/code.' && exit 1; [ -z "$GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL" ] && echo 'FATAL: GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL not set. Configure it in your Claude Code environment at claude.ai/code.' && exit 1; git config user.name "$GIT_AUTHOR_NAME" && git config user.email "$GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL"; fi

if [ "$CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE" = 'true' ]; then if ! command -v gh >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Installing gh CLI...'; curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg | sudo dd of=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg 2>/dev/null && echo 'deb [arch=amd64 signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list >/dev/null && sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq gh >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'gh CLI installed successfully'; else echo 'gh CLI already installed'; fi; if [ -z "$GITHUB_TOKEN" ]; then echo 'WARNING: GITHUB_TOKEN not set — gh pr create will fail. Set it at claude.ai/code environment settings.'; fi; fi
if [ ! -f node_modules/.modules.yaml ]; then echo 'pnpm store not linked — running install...'; pnpm install --frozen-lockfile; else echo 'node_modules already linked — skipping install'; fi
